_comment: Sample PlayerInjuryHistory payload — the shape the scraper/normalizer must produce and the API returns under { injuries: ... }. Use it to render the tab without a live data source.

nfl.description: Right hamstring strain suffered in Week 12; missed three games.
Tweaked left ankle but did not miss any time.
Entered concussion protocol after a Week 8 hit.
Torn left ACL ended the season in Week 14.

college.description: Missed two games with a high-ankle sprain as a senior.
Minor wrist injury, no games missed.
